description: New for this season, the LiteTrace series of backpacks are designed for maximum performance on the trails in lightweight, comfortable silhouettes. The LiteTrace Hydration Pack has a three-liter water bladder with a tube that can exit on either the left or right side. Made entirely from recycled plastic bottles that have been repurposed into ripstop fabric that's durable and won't catch on branches or rocky boulders, this water-resistant pack has quick-adjust shoulder and sternum straps for optimal Fit and weight distribution, tricot-lined media pockets and includes rain covers.Height: 47 cmWidth: 8cmDepth: 21 cmCapacity: 16litres Made with 50% recycled fibers like polyester and wool to help reduce environment impact if material protectionFabrics and back panel are specially designed to promote air flow and channel moisture away from the body for superior moisture controlThree-litre bladder with customizable tube exitExternal stretch and adjustable pocket Polypropylene webbing to make the pack water resistantWaterproof rain cover in a zipper at the bottomQuick adjust shoulder strap with sternum straps for durabilityTricot lined media pocket with portCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
